name: EINHERJAR INDEPENDENT SOLUTIONS
quote:
Against all odds, We turn the tide!
blending old cradle technology with todays esoteric technology.
description:
Einherjar Independent Solutions (EINS) is a small time manufacturer that fields a collection of old cradle technology paired together with todays panoply of technology.

The manufacturer itself is an oddball amongst the galaxy's plethora of manufacturers, due to its insistence of providing only niche technology that solves niche situations.

The members and staff of the manufacturer are a diverse tapestry of individuals, ranging from brilliant scientists, tech innovators, former soldiers, visionary artists and philosophers. Bound by a common goal and pursuit of mastery in their own craft, protecting the sentient and sapient and the unraveling of the universe's deepest mysteries.

EINS frames, core bonuses and licenses are perfect for pilots looking to pilot mechs that fill very specific combat roles with supplemented equipment's that fill specific needs.
